name: hardness-tester
description: Electron + React 19 + Node.js Vickers measurement software
author: Chennai Metco

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../native/hardness-addon && npm install && cd ../serial-addon && npm install && cd ../.. && npm run rebuild-native
scripts.rebuild-serialport: electron-rebuild -f -w serialport && electron-rebuild -f -w serialport -m backend && electron-rebuild -f -w serialport -m native/serial-addon
scripts.rebuild-native: npm run rebuild-serialport && npm run rebuild-addon && npm run rebuild-serial-addon
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BE,FE,EL "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: dotenv -e .env -e backend/.env -- npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: dotenv -e .env -e frontend/.env -- npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:prod: npm run rebuild-native && dotenv -e .env.prod -e backend/.env.prod -e frontend/.env.prod -- npm run build
scripts.prepackage: npm run fetch:vc-redist && npm run verify:drivers
